content: Chaos Sanctuary（中文黑话常称“超市”）是 Diablo II 第四幕的关键区域，位于 River of Flame 之后，是玩家开启五个封印并最终挑战 Diablo 的地点。This curated anchor card exists to stabilize bilingual retrieval for the common Chinese nickname “超市”. Primary reference: The Arreat Summit - Maps: Act IV.
